summary: The diff shows modifications to backend/main.mo and project_state.json. The backend Motoko actor appears to have been updated with imports and type definitions, but the diff is truncated so full compilation fixes cannot be confirmed. No frontend changes are present in the diff, and the feature request status remains 'pending' in project_state.json. It is unclear whether the deployment issues were fully resolved.

missing_requirements.requirement: Frontend React app builds without errors
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend files (e.g., React components, hooks, build config) were modified or added in the diff. If the previous build failed due to frontend errors, they would not be resolved by these changes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Application deploys successfully to the Internet Computer
missing_requirements.reason: No deployment configuration files (e.g., dfx.json, canister configs) were modified, and the project_state.json still shows status 'pending', suggesting deployment has not been confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: All existing features (session management, player profiles, match recording, game type selector, ranked toggle) remain functional after redeployment
missing_requirements.reason: The backend diff is truncated and no frontend changes are present, making it impossible to confirm all existing features remain functional. The project_state.json lists existing_features as an empty array, providing no evidence of feature preservation.
